name: Surat

seo.description: Compare 680+ verified packers and movers in Surat. Instant quotes starting ₹4,000. Adajan, Vesu, Katargam, Pal covered. Live GPS tracking, ₹5L protection.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Surat
hero.subtitle: Adajan to Vesu, Katargam to Pal — 680+ verified movers across the Diamond City.

intro:
Surat is one of India's fastest-growing cities, with constant movement between its diamond-trade hubs, textile markets, and expanding residential zones like Vesu, Adajan, and Pal. Radhe packers and movers's 680+ verified vendors handle it all.

Instant quotes, no hidden charges, same-day availability.
whyUs: Surat's rapid growth means new society buildings are opening constantly. Our vendor network stays updated on new residential towers, access rules, and the city's BRTS-influenced traffic patterns.

faqs.q: What does a 2 BHK move cost in Surat?
faqs.a: ₹6,500 – ₹12,000 depending on locality, floor, and packing scope.

faqs.q: Do you cover Vesu and Pal areas?
faqs.a: Yes — all zones including Vesu, Pal, Adajan, Katargam, Varachha and Bhestan are covered.
₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking.
